# The Cannabis White Papers

> Beginner-friendly, peer-reviewed white papers on medical cannabis cultivation: propagation, crop steering, environment, plant health, precision irrigation, facility and quality.

Licensed CC BY-NC 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/). Attribution: The Cannabis White Papers. Each paper has a clean markdown version under /papers/ with sources preserved as footnotes.

## Propagation
- [Cleaning up cannabis genetics with tissue culture](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/tissue-culture.md): Clean up genetics from a speck of tissue
- [Seeds, germination and seedlings](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/seeds-germination.md): Pop seeds and raise seedlings
- [Cloning: cuttings that root every time](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/cloning.md): Cuttings that root every time

## Vegetative growth
- [Light acclimation: raise PPFD in steps so plants don't bleach](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/light-acclimation.md): Ramp light without bleaching
- [Defoliation and plant training for maximum yield](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/defoliation-training.md): Train the canopy for yield

## Flowering
- [Precision coco cultivation: crop steering in coir](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/coco-crop-steering.md): Steer the plant with water
- [The flower cycle, week by week](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/flowering-stages.md): The flip through to ripe
- [Crop steering in rockwool: drybacks, saturation and the breaking point](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/rockwool-crop-steering.md): Drybacks, saturation, the breaking point
- [The one steering law: coco, rockwool, soil & water](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/one-steering-law.md): Coco, rockwool, soil and water, one way to steer

## Harvest, dry, trim & cure
- [Harvest, dry, trim and cure](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/harvest-dry-trim-cure.md): The whole post-harvest run
- [GMP hash manufacturing: facility flow and quality control](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/gmp-hash-lab.md): Turn flower into concentrate

## Environment & climate
- [The cannabis grow room: a systems guide](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/grow-room-systems.md): The whole room as one system
- [Airflow design for indoor cultivation](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/airflow-design.md): Move air like the pros
- [CO2 enrichment: feeding the plant carbon, safely](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/co2-enrichment.md): Feed the plant carbon, safely
- [Scaling light to the limiting factor](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/scaling-high-light.md): Find the limiting factor, dial to it
- [Lighting: spectrum, PPFD and DLI](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/lighting-fundamentals.md): Spectrum, PPFD & DLI
- [Under-canopy lighting: photons at the floor](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/under-canopy-lighting.md): Photons at the floor: SCL & ICL

## Water, substrate & feed
- [Substrates compared: coco, rockwool, soil, hydro](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/substrates-overview.md): Coco, rockwool, soil, hydro
- [Source water, RO and alkalinity](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/water-quality.md): Source water, RO & alkalinity
- [pH: what it is and how to hold it](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/ph-management.md): Hold pH, avoid lockout
- [Nutrient deficiency and toxicity diagnosis](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/nutrient-deficiencies.md): Read the leaves, fix the feed
- [Mixing an Athena Pro Line stock tank (metric)](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/nutrient-mixing-athena.md): Salts, in metric, done right

## Plant health
- [Mould risk: preventing and stopping bud rot](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/mould-risk.md): Spot and stop bud rot
- [Integrated pest management blueprint for indoor medicinal cannabis in Auckland](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/auckland-ipm-blueprint.md): Clean stock, NZ law, atlas & CAPA
- [Pest identification and control](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/pest-id.md): Mites, thrips, gnats and more
- [Integrated pest management: a working SOP](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/ipm-sop.md): Scout, decide, act
- [PPPE: plant and personal protective equipment](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/pppe.md): Gowning, gloves, keeping humans clean

## Precision & automation
- [Root-zone state estimation with the TEROS-12 sensor](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/root-zone-teros12.md): What the sensor really sees
- [The smart watering brain (VRWE), in plain English](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/smart-watering-vrwe.md): The watering brain, plain English
- [Signal and noise: precision cultivation](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/signal-and-noise.md): Real signal vs sensor noise
- [The closed loop: levers, signal and plant state](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/closed-loop.md): Levers, signal & plant state
- [From telemetry to intelligence: the plant-state dashboard](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/plant-state-dashboard.md): From telemetry to intelligence
- [F2 crop steering: the daily operating manual](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/f2-crop-steering.md): The daily P0-P3 cycle
- [Automated irrigation system manual](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/irrigation-manual.md): Install and run the system
- [DIY plant-biosignal sensor: read a plant's electrical signals](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/plant-biosignal-sensor.md): Read a plant's electrical signals for ~NZ$110

## Facility & quality
- [Designing a grow facility in 3D before you build it](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/facility-3d.md): See the build before you build it
- [Daily checks: the self-completing facility round](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/papers/daily-checks.md): The self-completing facility round

## Optional
- [Full corpus (all papers)](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/llms-full.txt): every paper concatenated
- [Manifest (JSON index)](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/manifest.json): machine-readable paper index
- [Glossary (JSON)](https://jaketherabbit.github.io/cannabis-white-papers/glossary.json): 388 defined terms
